raw_consumer_statement: On or about the late XXXX early XXXX I noticed some unauthorized transactions on my credit card account. I paid the account unaware of the additional charges, then cancelled the payment. Ive been waiting 8 months for them this account. But they keep insisting I pay the account until the investigation is over. Yet every time they call, I ask for arbitration and my calls are dropped. As a result of their failure to properly address this account and refusal to allow me to seek resolve and thier continuation of breaching the agreement for unauthorized transaction. Theyre attempting to intimidate me to pay these charges and if I dont, theyre charging me interest on the account, reducing my usage across other non related accounts, reduced my credit usage, reduced my credit rating, threaten to close the account, refuse me access to other accounts with Amex, threatening to send the account to collectionsand refusing to allow me to make contact with arbitration.
